iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. DNI Gabbard confirms IC: Iran NOT rebuilding enrichment. Nuclear doctrine unchanged. No nuclear dimension. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - IMMINENT. UKMTO: NO confirmed vessel attacks since Mar 12 (8 days quiet). Trump denies ground troops: 'I'm not putting troops.' USS Tripoli (2000 Marines/31st MEU) still en route to Hormuz. US strikes expand to Caspian Sea (first). Gabbard: IC confirms Iran NOT rebuilding enrichment pre-war. Oil $119→$108. Netanyahu: 'war ending faster than people think.' Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UKMTO: No confirmed vessel attacks in Strait of Hormuz since March 12
latest_news.text: UK Maritime Trade Operations reports no confirmed attacks on vessels since March 12 — 8 days of relative maritime calm despite ongoing conflict. 20+ total incidents since war began Mar 1.

latest_news.headline: US strikes on Iranian naval assets expand to Caspian Sea
latest_news.text: US strikes on Iranian naval assets now reaching the Caspian Sea — previously confined to Gulf of Oman and Persian Gulf. Geographic expansion of naval campaign. Caspian bordered by Russia.

latest_news.headline: Trump denies sending ground troops to Iran
latest_news.text: Trump explicitly denies ground troop deployment: 'If I were, I certainly wouldn't tell you. But I'm not putting troops.' Contradicts Reuters report of US weighing troops on Iran shoreline.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard: US intel found Iran NOT rebuilding nuclear enrichment before war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony — written statement confirmed IC found Iran had NOT attempted to rebuild enrichment after June 2025 strikes. Undercuts Trump's 'imminent threat' justification.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 95% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - IMMINENT. No major changes. Ground invasion past Litani ongoing. Central Beirut strikes. Bridges destroyed. 1000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Netanyahu: 'war ending faster than people think' (referring to Iran, not Lebanon). Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace historically. NATO Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 7% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (up). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. Arms to Iran ongoing. No direct intervention. Oil boost to Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. No changes. Status quo. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - DETERRENT. No activity. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 37% (down). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - CRITICAL. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday peace talks. Putin deadliest day: 1700+ troops lost. Peace talks paused due to Iran war bandwidth. Oil boost reduces Russian economic pressure. Attacks down 85% (50+/day → 7-10/day). Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 37% (stable). Day 21 Hour 10 auto - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP 3-day truce. No fighting. Post-Eid resumption expected Mar 23. Updated 2026-03-20T10:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: USS Tripoli (2000 Marines/31st MEU) en route to Strait of Hormuz - targeting Kharg Island, Qeshm

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 21 Hour 10. POSITIVE: UKMTO confirms 8 days no vessel attacks in Hormuz (since Mar 12). Trump denies ground troops deployment. Netanyahu hints war 'ending faster than people think.' BUT: USS Tripoli (2000 Marines) still heading to Hormuz. Caspian Sea strikes = geographic expansion. Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls legislation. Gabbard intel controversy undermines 'imminent threat' narrative. Oil surged to $119 then settled $108. Qatar LNG 17% cut.

latest_news.headline: USS Tripoli with 2000 Marines (31st MEU) heading to Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: USS Tripoli LHA-7 spotted near Singapore carrying 2000+ Marines (31st MEU). Targets: Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports) and Qeshm island in Strait of Hormuz. US boots on Iranian territory possible within days.

latest_news.headline: Reuters: US weighing military reinforcements, troops on Iran shoreline
latest_news.text: US considering deploying troops to Iran shoreline to secure Strait of Hormuz. Options include safe passage via air/naval forces OR ground deployment. Escalation to potential ground incursion.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday peace talks
latest_news.text: Zelensky announces Ukrainian negotiating team heading to US for Saturday meeting. Directly contradicts Kremlin situational pause claim. Peace talks revival attempt despite Iran war.

latest_news.headline: Putin forces suffer deadliest day: 1700+ troops lost
latest_news.text: Ukraine claims Russian forces suffered deadliest day of 2026 with 1700+ troops lost. High casualty rate despite reduced operational tempo (7-10 attacks/day vs 50+).

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls on all Hormuz shipping
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz - new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 21, 10:04 UTC) - Day 21 of Iran war. MIXED SIGNALS: USS Tripoli (2000 Marines/31st MEU) heading to Hormuz BUT Trump denies ground troops. UKMTO: 8 days no vessel attacks — potential maritime calm. US strikes expand to Caspian Sea (bordered by Russia). Gabbard: IC says Iran NOT rebuilding nuclear enrichment. Netanyahu: 'war ending faster than people think.' Zelensky sends team to US for Saturday peace talks. Putin deadliest day: 1700+ troops. Oil $119→$108. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23.
